summary: Iteration 2 verification of Maventech Software PHP feature changes (review stars empty, dark mode polish, sitemap flash sans 'deprecated', auto-sitemap hint, 6 JSON-LD blocks with AI summary, logo placements). Combined 47/47 backend pytest cases PASS (24 baseline test_seo_php.py + 23 new test_iteration2_features.py). Frontend dark-mode public verification via Playwright on /reviews.php passed: 0 pre-checked rating radios, dark-mode-polish.css loaded, body[data-brand-motion]=bounce, brand-logo carries .logo-3d class, no fg/bg color collisions on h1/h2/badges/inputs.
critical_code_review_comments: admin.php sitemap submit handler is clean: literal google.com/ping and bing.com/ping URLs are gone (only an explanatory comment mentions the word 'deprecated', not in user-visible flash output).

reviews.php — input[name=rating] no longer carries `checked`. CSS .star-input rule in style.css uses #fbbf24 (dark) / #f59e0b (light) with -webkit-text-stroke so the gold highlight is high-contrast in both themes — verified via dark-mode load + screenshot.

includes/seo-content.php product_ai_summary_jsonld() correctly emits Article schema with about→Product, audience.audienceType, keywords, mainEntityOfPage pointing to /product.php — all 4 AI-search-citation fields verified.
Auto-sitemap-hint conditional render verified: persists across save; href is exactly $domain + '/sitemap.xml' as required.

admin-shell.php loads dark-mode-polish.css and decorates the topbar brand with .logo-3d — confirmed in source. checkout.php co-banner-brand also has .logo-3d. All three logo placements (navbar, checkout banner, admin topbar) consistent.
No regressions: 24/24 baseline test_seo_php.py still pass (blog filter, product 6 blocks, category 5 blocks, admin sitemap submit, admin save domain, public pages 200).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on Playwright spot-checks (reviews.php dark mode + brand-logo + body[data-brand-motion]); admin UI verified via authenticated pytest session

seed_data_creation: Reused iteration_1 review seed (customer_reviews ids 7,8,9). Each test_admin_save_site_domain_url test run persists a fresh timestamped value to settings.site_domain_url — that is intentional to keep auto-sitemap-hint visible for downstream tests and to exercise the IndexNow auto-submit branch.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run both pytest files together: `PHP_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 python3 -m pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. Baseline is 47/47. test_iteration2_features.py::TestAutoSitemapHint writes a new site_domain_url every run; if you want a clean slate, delete via SQL: `DELETE FROM settings WHERE skey='site_domain_url';`. PHP frontend on port 3000, preview URL https://stage-show-2.preview.emergentagent.com. For admin UI tests in Playwright, prefer using the requests.Session pattern (as in pytest) for login rather than form-fill — the login form may need additional fields the script wasn't supplying.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in this iteration — all 11 user-requested items behave as specified.
